news.headline: Teamsters in Dublin demand fair contract from Sutphen. Informational picket on Oct 18, 2024, at 11 am. #UnionStrong
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Teamsters Local 284 in Dublin, Ohio will be demanding Sutphen to negotiate a fair contract and cease providing taxpayer money to union busters. Members, allied unions, and officials will convene at 11 a.m. to address this issue.

news.headline: White House Economic Adviser Singh: Data shows that China is using its market power to gain economic and geopolitical leverage.
Trump vows more tax cuts, causing concern among Republicans after costly tax reforms in 2017.
news.summary: The tax agenda of the ex-President, Donald J. Trump, is criticized for being expensive and overshadowing the 2017 law changes he implemented. This has left some Republicans concerned about the impact.

Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC in Westport, Conn., has hired two new employees for their compliance and investment teams.
news.summary: A provider of capital to lower middle market companies, Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC (Balance Point), based in Westport, Connecticut, shared news on Oct. 17, 2024. The company introduced two new hires to their compliance and investment teams - Angela DeRose and Edward Lee. This strategic move aims to strengthen their operations further.

news.headline: Bullish Bank of America predicts gold may hit $3,000 by 2025 as prices reach $2,696/oz, citing as a safe haven asset due to economic concerns and inflation. Fed policy shifts support upward trend in gold prices.
news.summary: Bank of America issued a positive note on gold as it reached a record high of $2,696 per ounce. The precious metal is seen as a safe haven asset, especially amid concerns regarding U.S. fiscal policies and Treasury yields. Despite U.S. Treasury yields increasing, gold prices are rising due to factors like inflation expectations and Federal Reserve policy shifts. The first Fed rate cut led to higher inflation expectations, reducing real yields and boosting gold's appeal as an inflation hedge. Gold prices are tracked by the SPDR Gold Trust (NYSE:GLD) and have been climbing in recent weeks. Analysts attribute this surge to changing macroeconomic conditions and gold's role as a safe investment option.

news.headline: Dr. Andrew Kelly introduces scholarship for future doctors with 30 years experience.
news.summary: In Advance, North Carolina, on October 17, 2024, Dr. Andrew Kelly, a renowned Implantologist and Dental Implant Specialist with a wealth of expertise spanning more than three decades, has unveiled the inception of the Dr. Andrew Kelly Scholarship for aspiring doctors. This esteemed scholarship initiative aims to support and uplift...

news.headline: Benjamin Wey Scholarship offers $1,000 to undergraduate student pursuing business; aims to foster innovation in future entrepreneurs.
news.summary: In New York on October 17, 2024, the Benjamin Wey Scholarship for Entrepreneurs has officially launched its application process. This scholarship presents a singular grant amounting to $1,000 and is available to a driven undergraduate student who is focusing on a business or entrepreneurship degree. Benjamin Wey, an esteemed figure in the global arena, established this scholarship with the intention of supporting aspiring entrepreneurs.

news.headline: Biden and Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu agreed that there is an opportunity to promote the release of the hostages - AXIOS.
Solar sector funding down 23% YoY to $22.3B in 9M 2024, reports Mercom Capital Group. 28.3 GW of solar projects acquired.
news.summary: In the city of Austin, Texas, nearly 28.3 gigawatts of solar projects were purchased during the initial nine months of the year.

news.headline: AusperBio will present new clinical data on AHB-137 at AASLD 2024 - a promising antisense therapy for liver disease.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 17, 2024, AusperBio Therapeutic, Inc. and Ausper Biopharma Co., Ltd. jointly known as AusperBio, revealed new clinical findings about their primary candidate AHB-137, an antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) treatment. The companies are clinical-stage biotechnology firms. The announcement did not specify the exact details of the data but highlighted its significance in the candidate's development.

news.headline: Nicor Gas' C3 wins E Source award for Residential Customer Experience in 2024. NAPERVILLE, Ill. - Oct 17, 2024.
news.summary: The Community Connection Center (C3) in Naperville, Illinois, recently won the 2024 E Source Achievement in Residential Customer Experience Award. This accolade was received on October 17, 2024, and highlights the success of the Nicor Gas Energy Efficiency Program's C3 in providing top-notch services to residential customers. The award recognizes the exceptional work of C3 in enhancing customer experience.

news.headline: Medical services sector evolves with digital applications. Global healthcare analytics market projected to surpass $130 billion by 2029. Stocks like ELV, DOCS, HQY set to benefit. Manpower shortage in healthcare predicted; US to face deficit of 100,000+ healthcare workers by 2028. 3 trends shaping medical services industry: digital revolution, data analytics adoption, value-based care shift.
news.summary: The Medical Services sector is seeing significant growth driven by innovation and digital applications, with telemedicine and AI-powered technology services on the rise. The global healthcare analytics market is projected to exceed $130 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 22.9% from 2024 to 2029. Companies like Elevance Health, Inc., Doximity, and HealthEquity are expected to benefit from this transformation. However, there is a looming shortage of healthcare workers globally, with a projected deficit of over 100,000 healthcare workers in the United States by 2028, particularly in nursing assistants. This shortage is leading to increased labor costs and healthcare expenses. The Zacks Medical Services industry covers third-party service providers like pharmacy benefit managers and surgical facility providers, and has shifted towards value-based care. The industry is embracing digital revolution trends such as remote monitoring, robotic surgeries, big-data analytics, 3D printing, and electronic health records.

news.headline: VyStar Credit Union celebrates 76th International Credit Union Day in 2024 with "One World Through Cooperative Finance" theme.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on October 17, 2024, VyStar Credit Union is pleased to be part of the worldwide credit union community commemorating the 76th International Credit Union (ICU) Day. The event, celebrated globally, focuses on the theme "One World Through Cooperative Finance," highlighting the importance of cooperative financial institutions worldwide.

news.headline: Friday FX Option Expiries
Last week, money-market funds lost $6.5 billion. Cash outflow not a concern for now.
CX360, Inc. backs FCC ruling for georouting in calls to 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, aiming for high-quality care.
news.summary: The choice to maintain the centralized routing system highlights the commitment of the 988 Lifeline to ensuring a uniform level of quality in mental health and crisis services. This decision supports the Lifeline's goal of offering reliable care to those in need.

news.headline: Kraken launches 'Project Mercury' to set global standards for integrating 200 million clean tech devices by 2030
news.summary: In London, Kraken has introduced 'Project Mercury', a new initiative aimed at establishing global standards for incorporating clean technology into smart energy systems. The project aims to create a consortium of hardware manufacturers to streamline the integration of the estimated 200 million clean tech devices expected to be operational by 2030. Referred to as 'Mercury Enabled', the initiative will introduce technical guidelines to ensure the certification of device interoperability and functionality to facilitate energy grid support.

news.headline: Osisko Mining shareholders approve acquisition by Gold Fields, marked by strong support at the special meeting.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 17, 2024, Osisko Mining Inc. (TSX:OSK) shared that its shareholders have significantly backed the Arrangement Resolution at a recent special meeting held at the Bennett Jones LLP offices.

news.headline: Aspen Power completes 8.5 MW solar projects in Maine to reduce emissions and provide affordable clean energy to locals.
news.summary: A company called Aspen Power, specializing in distributed generation for clean energy, marked the completion of two community solar projects in Corinth and Prospect, Maine. These sites, totaling 8.5 MW of renewable energy capacity, were celebrated this week. The installations aim to cut greenhouse gas emissions and make affordable clean energy accessible for the local communities. The projects consist of over 17,000 ground-mounted units.

news.headline: Georgia Power offers Installment Payment Plans for customers affected by Hurricane Helene until Nov 30, 2024.
news.summary: Georgia Power has unveiled a new customer assistance program aimed at aiding the recovery efforts post-Hurricane Helene. Enrollment for this initiative will remain open until November 30, 2024. The program offers flexible installment options to support customers during the rebuilding phase.

news.headline: Abdel Hamed, PE, appointed as VP at Quiddity Engineering's San Antonio office. Significant move for company growth.
news.summary: A civil engineering, planning, and surveying firm, Quiddity Engineering of Texas has recently appointed Abdel Hamed, PE, as the Vice President at its San Antonio office. Taking on the role, Abdel will be spearheading project execution for the company. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to enhance its operations and take advantage of Abdel's expertise.

news.headline: Eversource on TIME’s List of World’s Best Companies for 2024
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut and Boston, Eversource (NYSE: ES) has solidified its standing as an energy industry frontrunner by being included in TIME’s listing of the World’s Best Companies in 2024. Collaborating with global research and data firm Statista, Eversource earned the prestigious #396 spot out of 1,000 companies worldwide and clinched the top spot among U.S. utilities. This acknowledgment underscores the energy company’s outstanding performance across three crucial areas: employee satisfaction, revenue growth, and overall operational excellence.

news.headline: Adecco is filling thousands of seasonal roles nationwide before the holidays via their "jobmobiles." Major employers are hiring for the shopping rush.
IKO launches 5 new Dynasty® Cool Colors Plus shingles to enhance roofing aesthetics. Expansion aims to attract more customers.
news.summary: In the bustling city of Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, a renowned company known as IKO, which specializes in roofing, waterproofing, and insulation solutions for both residential and commercial sectors, made a significant announcement. Excitingly, IKO revealed its plan to enhance the existing Dynasty® Cool Colors Plus shingle collection by introducing five new captivating designs to their esteemed line-up. This expansion is set to offer consumers a wider range of options when it comes to selecting top-quality roofing materials.

news.headline: Business services firms beat estimates in Q3 2024 with 5.2% earnings growth and 4.9% revenue growth. 81.3% beat EPS, 72.9% sales projections. S&P 500 sector earnings expected to grow 5.4%, revenues 6.5%. Firms like Fiserv, Booz Allen, S&P Global, ADP anticipated to surpass estimates. Services PMI stayed above 50% for 49 out of 52 months.
news.summary: The third quarter of 2024 showed strong demand for business services, fueled by digital transformation, cost efficiency needs, flexible workforce solutions, and regulatory adherence. Earnings of S&P 500 members in this sector grew 5.2% YoY on 4.9% revenue growth, with 81.3% beating EPS estimates and 72.9% surpassing sales projections. Total earnings for the sector's S&P 500 members are expected to grow by 5.4% YoY, with revenues predicted to rise by 6.5%. Companies like Fiserv, Booz Allen Hamilton, S&P Global, and ADP are expected to beat estimates. The Services PMI stayed above 50% for the 49th time in 52 months, indicating steady growth in the sector.

news.headline: Semiconductor sector surges, S&P 500 hits new highs on TSMC's strong earnings. Nvidia hits $141 per share, retail sales beat expectations.
news.summary: The S&P 500 reached new all-time highs due to a semiconductor rally, driven by strong earnings from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM). The iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) rose by 2.3%, with NVIDIA Corp. (NVDA) hitting a high of $141 per share. The Nasdaq 100 outperformed other indices, while small caps lagged behind. September retail sales surpassed expectations, and jobless claims decreased, supporting the economy's strength. The U.S. dollar strengthened with the dollar index (DXY) reaching early August levels. The article also discusses doubts about the need for further Fed rate cuts in November.

news.headline: Santa Clara University named 2024 Diversity Champion by Insight Into Diversity magazine, recognizing its DEI efforts.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Santa Clara University has been honored with the prestigious Diversity Champion designation by Insight Into Diversity magazine. This recognition marks the first time the university has received this accolade, underscoring its commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Santa Clara has previously been acknowledged for its efforts in this area with the Higher Education Excellence in Diversity (HEED) Award for three consecutive years. The university's dedication to fostering a diverse and inclusive environment has positioned it as a leader in this realm among higher education institutions.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs have quickly amassed over $20B in just 10 months post approval, setting a new record for trading activity.
news.summary: In January, Bitcoin exchange-traded funds were given approval and have since seen unprecedented trading activity compared to other ETFs.

news.headline: Galaxis joins forces with TV show 'Killer Whales' to empower creators, allowing exposure to millions of viewers.
news.summary: The collaboration will involve Galaxis being prominently featured in the reality show, while also providing significant support to the Web3 projects highlighted.

news.headline: Raiven Capital to attend AIM Summit in Dubai on Oct 21-22, 2024 - global venture fund discussing investment trends.
news.summary: A prominent early-stage technology global venture fund, Raiven Capital, revealed its involvement in the upcoming AIM Summit in Dubai, a major platform for discussing investment trends and global market conditions. The summit is set to occur on October 21-22, 2024, attracting key decision-makers and C-level executives.AIM Summit serves as a crucial crossroads for industry leaders, facilitating discussions on emerging trends in the market landscape.

news.headline: Warner Baxter & John Lange join WEC Energy Group's board of directors. Baxter from Ameren Corp & Lange from Barclays PLC.
news.summary: In Milwaukee on October 17, 2024, it was announced that Warner Baxter, former executive chairman and CEO of Ameren Corp., and John Lange, former global head of the Energy and Industrials Groups at Barclays PLC, have been named as new board members of WEC Energy. Baxter brings his expertise from Ameren Corp., where he served as executive chairman and CEO, while Lange's experience at Barclays PLC strengthens the board's energy and industrial knowledge. Their appointment signifies a strategic move for WEC Energy, expanding the board's leadership with respected industry professionals.

news.headline: Fed likely to reduce rates by 0.25% as advised by Dowding - report.
India is testing its allies with growing patience, straining friendships.
Juniper Networks upgrades JATCO's WiFi network with AI networking portfolio. JATCO specializes in manufacturing Continuously Variable Transmissions.
news.summary: Juniper Networks, Inc. (NYSE: JNPR) has had JATCO Ltd., a major player in the automotive transmission industry, choose to utilize JNPR's AI native networking portfolio to upgrade its WiFi network. JNPR's offerings incorporate Mist AI, utilizing data science and machine learning to optimize network performance. JATCO has implemented Juniper AP43 and Juniper AP63 Access Points, which leverage Juniper's AIOps technology. The AP43 analyzes data in real time for wireless clients, aiding in swift problem detection and troubleshooting recommendations. The AP63 provides real-time network insights, location services, and automated operations. JATCO, owned by Nissan, Mitsubishi Motors, and Suzuki, specializes in Continuously Variable Transmissions, aiming to mass produce electric powertrains alongside traditional internal combustion engines.

news.headline: 30-year fixed-rate mortgages climbed after dropping post-Fed rate cut. Demand for affordable housing on the rise, benefiting homebuilders like Cavco Ind. (NASDAQ: CVCO) amid forecasted lower interest rates. Strong market outlook for D.R. Horton Inc. (NYSE: DHI) and Lennar Corp. (NYSE: LEN) with market cap of $50B+. Shortage of 7.3M rental homes for low-income renters in U.S. prompts increased focus on affordable housing solutions.
news.summary: After initially dropping due to the Federal Reserve's rate cut, 30-year fixed-rate mortgages have increased. This has led to a more positive environment for homebuilding companies, as buyers are urged to make offers and companies can access loans easier for development projects. Major players like D.R. Horton Inc. and Lennar Corp. have market capitalizations of around $50 billion each and close tens of thousands of homes yearly. With interest rates expected to drop further, smaller players like Cavco Industries Inc., a mid-cap firm that deals in pre-fabricated homes and RVs, might find more room in the market. Cavco addresses the housing crisis in the U.S., with an estimated shortage of 7.3 million rental homes for low-income renters.

news.headline: Donegal Group Inc. declares quarterly dividends: $0.1725/share for Class A, $0.155/share for Class B. Payable on Nov 15, record as of Nov 1.
news.summary: The board of directors of Donegal Group Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend for their Class A and Class B common stock. Stockholders of record as of November 1, 2024, will receive $0.1725 per share for Class A and $0.155 per share for Class B. The dividends will be paid on November 15, 2024. Donegal Group Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the tickers DGICA and DGICB.

news.headline: Billionaire influencers like Musk, Saylor, and Cuban hold sway over crypto prices. Elon Musk voted biggest crypto influencer.
news.summary: The article discusses how key influencers, particularly billionaires and cryptocurrency founders, can significantly impact the prices of various cryptocurrencies with a single tweet or public comment. A recent poll by Benzinga reveals the top influencers in the cryptocurrency world:1. Elon Musk: 56%2. Michael Saylor: 20%3. Mark Cuban: 9%4. Vitalik Buterin: 9%5. Jack Dorsey: 6%Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla Inc and the world's richest man, is the most influential figure in the poll. He played a crucial role in Tesla adding Bitcoin to its balance sheet and has also affected the price movements of Dogecoin. The article also mentions doubts surrounding the recent documentary claiming to reveal the true identity of Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin, and the potential impact of comments from other public figures on the volatility of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin.

news.headline: Keith McCullough, Founder and CEO of Hedgeye, releases new eBook "Master The Market" with 52-page practical guide.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Hedgeye Risk Management unveiled their latest eBook titled "Master The Market: A Hedge Fund Manager's Guide to Process and Profit," authored by the company's Founder and CEO, Keith McCullough. The eBook, spanning 52 pages, provides a valuable insight into navigating the market effectively. This release marks a significant milestone for the company in offering expert guidance to interested individuals.

news.headline: Lennox donates 400+ HVAC units to homeowners in need for year-round comfort through Feel The Love program.
news.summary: In its 15th year anniversary, Feel The Love program supported by the LII Lennox Foundation continues to provide new HVAC units to community heroes across North America. Lennox and its dealer network from Richardson, Texas, join forces to supply and install these units, benefiting local heroes.

news.headline: Wisconsin Electric board declares 90 cents/share dividend for Preferred Stock, 3.60% Series, payable on Dec 1, 2024.
news.summary: The board of directors at Wisconsin Electric announced today that they have approved a quarterly cash dividend of 90 cents per share for the company's Preferred Stock, 3.60% Series. This dividend is set to be paid on December 1, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 14, 2024. The board also approved...

news.headline: Fundamental Income secures $241 million securitization, with $144.6 million AAA rated debt.
news.summary: Phoenix-based private equity firm, Fundamental Income, has successfully closed a securitization deal worth $241 million. The transaction involved $144.6 million of AAA-rated debt.

news.headline: Trader earns over $5M trading meme coins PEPE, MOG, SPX, WOJAK. Big wins: $2.19M from PEPE, $1.7M from SPX, $1.37M from MOG, $207K from WOJAK.
news.summary: An analysis by Lookonchain has revealed a crypto trader who achieved significant profits by trading various cryptocurrencies. The trader's successful trades included Pepe (PEPE), Mog Coin (MOG), SPX6900 (SPX), and Wojak (WOJAK). Their most lucrative trade was with PEPE, which brought in $2.19 million. They also earned $1.7 million from SPX, $1.37 million from MOG, and $207,000 from WOJAK. The trader purchased 10.1 million SPX for $57,000 between December 2023 and May 2024, subsequently selling 9.1 million SPX for $1.12 million, resulting in a $1.7 million profit. Currently, they hold 318 billion PEPE valued at $3.24 million, with $2.19 million in unrealized gains. This information can be found in the full story accessible on Benzinga.com.
